Brand.description: LEESLE reinterprets Korean traditional aesthetics for the modern era, delivering unique value to enterprises and brands.
Brand.philosophy1: We believe the unique beauty of Korean traditional crafts and aesthetics can shine in modern everyday life.
Brand.philosophy2: All LEESLE products pursue harmony between tradition and modernity. We utilize traditional Korean materials and techniques—knots, embroidery, hanji, dancheong—while maintaining modern design sensibility and practicality.
Brand.philosophy3: For our enterprise partners, we co-create not just products, but brand experiences infused with Korean identity.
Brand.researchDesc: Deep research into Korean traditional aesthetics and modern trends to establish design foundations.
Brand.designDesc: We propose designs that reinterpret traditional elements in a modern way, refined together with our partners.
Brand.productionDesc: Combining skilled artisanship with cutting-edge technology to create high-quality products.
Brand.ctaTitle: Start a Special Project with LEESLE
Brand.ctaDescription: B2B custom production with Korean aesthetics. Contact us today.

Custom.pageDescription: LEESLE provides custom production services tailored to your brand identity.
Custom.step1Desc: We discuss brand concept, purpose, budget, and quantity. A dedicated designer is assigned to propose a custom plan.
Custom.step2Desc: We create 2-3 design drafts based on the plan. Final design is confirmed after incorporating your feedback.
Custom.step3Desc: Physical samples are produced from the confirmed design. You can verify materials, colors, and finishes in person.
Custom.step4Desc: After sample approval, mass production begins. Quality control ensures delivery on the promised schedule.
Custom.step5Desc: Safely packaged and delivered to your designated location. After-sales service and reorders are supported.
Custom.midCtaDesc: An idea is all you need. LEESLE takes care of the rest.
Custom.logoDesc: Apply corporate logos through laser engraving, silk printing, embroidery, and more.
Custom.colorDesc: Color matching to your brand palette. Precise colors achieved via Pantone codes.
Custom.packageDesc: Gift boxes, shopping bags, ribbons, wrapping paper—complete packaging tailored to your brand.
Custom.moqNote: * Lead times are calculated from design confirmation and may vary based on quantity and complexity.
Custom.bottomCtaDesc: LEESLE's expert team supports you end-to-end from planning to delivery. We'll respond within 24 hours.
